amendments.normalized_body: snapshot_plan_hash() silently swallows I/O errors (corrupt snapshot JSON, permission failures) via .ok(), making them indistinguishable from 'no snapshot exists.' Consider logging a warning or tracing event when read_snapshot returns an Err that is not NotFound, so operators can detect a corrupted snapshot that is silently preventing plan_hash auto-population.

The deny_unknown_fields guard on StartJournalDetails and CompletionJournalDetails provides runtime detection (parse returns None, which causes journal repair to fall back to appending), but the stated acceptance criterion asks for 'compile-time or test failure.' The round-trip tests fulfill the 'test failure' criterion only if they are run — consider adding a doc-comment or CLAUDE.md note explaining that the deny_unknown_fields + round-trip test pair is the chosen enforcement mechanism, so future developers know this is an intentional two-layer guard rather than just a serde annotation.

`plan_hash` auto-population still does not repair the legacy rows that motivated Issue 3. New rows get the snapshot hash at `src/adapters/fs.rs:2945-2957`, but once a running/terminal row already exists with `plan_hash: null`, both the replay path in `src/adapters/fs.rs:2909-2923` and the finalize path in `src/adapters/fs.rs:3228-3250` explicitly skip snapshot-based backfill. That means a task-run row written by the old code without `plan_hash` will stay null forever even when the milestone snapshot already has the canonical plan hash, so lineage for pre-upgrade attempts is still incomplete. The new regressions at `src/contexts/milestone_record/service.rs:5122-5308` lock in that lossiness instead of fixing it.

final_accepted_amendments.normalized_body: snapshot_plan_hash() silently swallows I/O errors (corrupt snapshot JSON, permission failures) via .ok(), making them indistinguishable from 'no snapshot exists.' Consider logging a warning or tracing event when read_snapshot returns an Err that is not NotFound, so operators can detect a corrupted snapshot that is silently preventing plan_hash auto-population.

payload.summary: Final review accepted 1 amendment(s); restart required.
